jobTypes.name: Event
jobTypes.description: Import Async APIs individually or in bulk. One time only or sync with a source.
jobTypes.metadata: Mode","description":"","visualStyle":"{ \"chooser\":\"enum\", \"values\":[\"ignore\",\"useFirst\",\"useFirstClone\",\"useLast\",\"useLastClone\",\"only\",\"onlyClone\"], \"default\":\"use\" \"values\":[\"ignore\",\"use\",\"useClone\",\"useCloneIfExists\"], \"default\":\"useCloneIfExists\" Type","description":"","visualStyle":"{ \"chooser\":\"interfaceType\" }","cardinality":"0..1","storage":{"location":"JOB.CONFIG","type":"string","field":"interfaceType"}},{"label":"Design Type","description":"Set the type for the new design","visualStyle":"{ \"chooser\":\"designType\" }","cardinality":"0..1","storage":{"location":"JOB.CONFIG","type":"string","field":"designType"}},{"label":"Store Input as Attachment","description":"If true then store the Input file as an attachment on the Specification","visualStyle":"{ \"chooser\":\"boolean\",\"default\":true }","cardinality":"1","storage":{"location":"JOB.CONFIG","type":"boolean","field":"storeInputFile"}},{"label":"Expand Stored Input","description":"If true then expand stored WSDL zip on the Specification","visualStyle":"{ \"chooser\":\"boolean\",\"default\":false Process","description":"If true then run any PostProcessing Javascript for the JobStep","visualStyle":"{ \"chooser\":\"boolean\",\"default\":true }","cardinality":"1","storage":{"location":"JOB.CONFIG","type":"boolean","field":"runPostProcess"}}]}
